title: Easy Home
description: EasyHome provides players with personalized home management across dimensions, allowing them to set and teleport to saved locations with configurable limits and cooldowns. Server admins get complete control over home limits, dimension restrictions etc.
body:
# Description
**EasyHome** is a comprehensive home management system that allows players to set and teleport to personalized locations across dimensions. It provides intuitive commands for home creation, management, and teleportation with robust permission-based access controls. Every message, cooldown, and setting is fully customizable through `config.yml` and `messages.yml`.

The plugin features **multi-dimensional home support**, **configurable limits**, **smart teleportation**, and administrative tools for server management. Unique systems include dimension-specific home restrictions, teleport cooldowns with customizable countdown displays, and OP-based infinite home allowances.

This elegant solution is perfect for survival servers seeking to enhance player convenience while maintaining balanced gameplay through configurable restrictions. _Java 17 or higher is required._

# Commands
- Set a home at your current location
```
/sethome <name>
```
- Teleport to a saved home (name optional if only one home exists)
```
/home [name]
```
- List all your homes with coordinates and dimensions
```
/homes
```
- View another player's homes (requires permission easyhome.seehomes)
```
/seehomes <player>
```
- Set maximum homes allowed per player (requires permission easyhome.maxhome)
```
/setmaxhome <number>
```
- Toggle home creation in specific dimensions (requires permission easyhome.toggledimension)
```
/toggledimension <overworld|nether|end>
```
- Delete a specified home
```
/delhome <name>
```
- Admin delete a player's home (requires permission easyhome.admindelhome)
```
/admindelhome <player> <home>
```
- Renames the specified home
```
/renamehome <oldname> <newname>
```
# Key Features
- **Multi-Dimensional Support**: Homes save dimension data and automatically handle cross-dimensional teleportation
- **Smart Home Detection**: `/home` command works without specifying names for players with single homes
- **Configurable Limits**: Non-OP players have default 3-home limit, OP players enjoy infinite homes
- **Cooldown System**: 120-second teleport cooldown and 300-second modification cooldown (both configurable within config.yml)
- **Visual Teleportation**: 5-second countdown displayed via title (middle of screen) or chat messages
- **Duplicate Protection**: Prevents players from creating multiple homes with identical names
- **Full Customization**: All messages, cooldowns, limits, and display preferences editable via config files
